욥기 10:1.content: “My soul is weary of my life. I will give free course to my complaint. I will speak in the bitterness of my soul.

욥기 10:2.content: I will tell God, ‘Do not condemn me. Show me why you contend with me.

욥기 10:3.content: Is it good to you that you should oppress, that you should despise the work of your hands, and smile on the counsel of the wicked?

욥기 10:4.content: Do you have eyes of flesh? Or do you see as man sees?

욥기 10:5.content: Are your days as the days of mortals, or your years as man’s years,

욥기 10:6.content: that you inquire after my iniquity, and search after my sin?

욥기 10:7.content: Although you know that I am not wicked, there is no one who can deliver out of your hand.

욥기 10:8.content: “ ‘Your hands have framed me and fashioned me altogether, yet you destroy me.

욥기 10:9.content: Remember, I beg you, that you have fashioned me as clay. Will you bring me into dust again?

욥기 10:10.content: Haven’t you poured me out like milk, and curdled me like cheese?

욥기 10:11.content: You have clothed me with skin and flesh, and knit me together with bones and sinews.

욥기 10:12.content: You have granted me life and loving kindness. Your visitation has preserved my spirit.

욥기 10:13.content: Yet you hid these things in your heart. I know that this is with you:

욥기 10:14.content: if I sin, then you mark me. You will not acquit me from my iniquity.

욥기 10:15.content: If I am wicked, woe to me. If I am righteous, I still will not lift up my head, being filled with disgrace, and conscious of my affliction.

욥기 10:16.content: If my head is held high, you hunt me like a lion. Again you show yourself powerful to me.

욥기 10:17.content: You renew your witnesses against me, and increase your indignation on me. Changes and warfare are with me.

욥기 10:18.content: “ ‘Why, then, have you brought me out of the womb? I wish I had given up the spirit, and no eye had seen me.

욥기 10:19.content: I should have been as though I had not been. I should have been carried from the womb to the grave.

욥기 10:20.content: Aren’t my days few? Stop! Leave me alone, that I may find a little comfort,

욥기 10:21.content: before I go where I will not return from, to the land of darkness and of the shadow of death;

욥기 10:22.content: the land dark as midnight, of the shadow of death, without any order, where the light is as midnight.’ ”
